sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الْعَمَلُ عَنْ بُعْدٍ نَمَطًا شَائِعًا فِي الْعَصْرِ الْحَدِيثِ بِفَضْلِ التَّطَوُّرِ التِّقْنِيِّ الْمُذْهِلِ.
sentences.translation: Rad na daljinu postao je uobičajen obrazac u modernom dobu zahvaljujući nevjerovatnom tehničkom razvoju.
sentences.translationEn: Remote work has become a common pattern in the modern era thanks to amazing technical development.

sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ هَذَا النَّوْعُ مِنَ الْوَظَائِفِ انْضِبَاطًا ذَاتِيًّا عَالِيًا لِضَمَانِ الْإِنْتَاجِيَّةِ الْمَطْلُوبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova vrsta posla zahtijeva visoku samodisciplinu kako bi se osigurala tražena produktivnost.
sentences.translationEn: This type of job requires high self-discipline to ensure the required productivity.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلْمُوَظَّفِ تَنْظِيمُ وَقْتِهِ بِمُرُونَةٍ، مِمَّا يُسَاعِدُ فِي تَحْقِيقِ التَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ الْحَيَاةِ الْمِهْنِيَّةِ وَالْخَاصَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenik može fleksibilno organizovati svoje vrijeme, što pomaže u postizanju ravnoteže između poslovnog i privatnog života.
sentences.translationEn: The employee can organize their time flexibly, which helps in achieving balance between professional and private life.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، قَدْ يُوَاجِهُ الْبَعْضُ تَحَدِّيَاتٍ مِثْلَ الشُّعُورِ بِالْعُزْلَةِ أَوِ الِافْتِقَارِ إِلَى التَّوَاصُلِ الْمُبَاشِرِ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, neki se mogu suočiti s izazovima poput osjećaja izolacije ili nedostatka direktne komunikacije.
sentences.translationEn: However, some may face challenges such as feeling isolated or lacking direct communication.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، تُعَدُّ الِاجْتِمَاعَاتُ الِافْتِرَاضِيَّةُ الدَّوْرِيَّةُ وَسِيلَةً فَعَّالَةً لِتَعْزِيزِ رُوحِ الْفَرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga se redovni virtuelni sastanci smatraju efikasnim sredstvom za jačanje timskog duha.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, regular virtual meetings are an effective way to enhance team spirit.
